chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 950 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.3427/2022 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 27-07-2022 Petitioner Jhando Khan Jarwar, present in person. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Law Officer of Election Commission of Pakistan. Mr. Bishar Ahmed Rahoojo, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Bakhshan Khan Mahar, Advocate, has filed power on behalf of respondent No.16, which is taken on record. Petitioner, appearing in person, does not press this petition and states that he has already approached the Election Commission of Pakistan for redressal of his grievance. In the view of above, the petition stands dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
